name: Fang

skills.name: Going Undercover
skills.description: Periodically reveals a random enemy hero within range.Attacks on monsters deal extra true damage.

skills.name: Target Sighted
skills.description: Marks the target enemy while gaining attack speed and range. Attacks on marked targets stack more marks, increasing mark damage. When marks expire or reach max stacks, they explode, dealing area damage.

skills.name: Wheel Away
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, slowing and dealing damage to enemies in his path. He is untargetable while dashing. Scorches the ground along the way, slowing and dealing damage to enemies in range.

skills.name: Bladestorm
skills.description: Throws his blade to the target location,dealing damage over time and slowing enemies wihin range.

tips: Fang (Marksman): Tier A on international ranked — 50.42% WR.
Build core: Relentless Blade, Boots of Tranquility, Meteor.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 50.42%, pick 1%, ban 0.04%, popularity tier A.
Counters Mai Shiranui, Nakoruru, Zilong · Weak into Dun.

faqs.question: Is Fang good in current season?
faqs.answer: Fang is Tier A Marksman with 50.42% win rate, 1% pick rate, and 0.04% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Fang build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Relentless Blade, Boots of Tranquility, Meteor, Axe of Torment, Rapacious Bite, Bloodweeper. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Fang?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Fang: Dun. Fang is strong into Mai Shiranui, Nakoruru, Zilong.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Mai Shiranui, Nakoruru, Zilong. Countered by: Dun.
